scripts.db:up: pnpm run db:volume && (docker start se-pg >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker run -d --name se-pg -p 5432:5432 -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=station_eden_dev -v se_pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres:16)
scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it se-pg psql -U postgres -d station_eden_dev
scripts.api:dev: pnpm exec dotenv -e apps/api/.env.local -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api start:dev
scripts.migrate:dev: pnpm run db:up && pnpm exec dotenv -e apps/api/.env.local -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api run migration:run
scripts.migrate:prod: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @station-eden/api run migration:run
scripts.dev: pnpm run migrate:dev && run-p api:dev web:dev
scripts.dev:nocache: pnpm run migrate:dev && run-p api:dev web:dev:nocache
scripts.prod:local: pnpm run migrate:prod && run-p api:prod web:dev
scripts.prod:local:nocache: pnpm run migrate:prod && run-p api:prod web:dev:nocache
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
